creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Samba-3.0.25a was released on 24 May 2007. It is a major bug
fix release. And samba-3.0.25-i18n-20070527.bz2 also needs update.

Fix: I made samba-3.0.25a-i18n-20070611.bz2 and put it at
http://home.jp.freebsd.org/~nakaji/samba-3.0.25a-i18n-20070611.bz2

	And, here is a diff of port skelton.
